post.description: Disable TOTP. Requires password + current TOTP code for confirmation.

get.description: List the current user's API keys (never returns plaintext key).

schema.title: Response List Api Keys V1 Auth Keys Get

post.description: Create a new API key. The plaintext key is returned once — save it.

delete.description: Revoke an API key. Only the owning user can revoke their own keys.

get.description: Return the configured step-up level and whether this session has completed it.

post.description: Complete admin step-up authentication and mark the session as verified.

get.description: Aggregate system stats. Requires admin:read scope or is_admin.
List all users with member counts. Requires admin:read scope or is_admin.

schema.title: Response List Users V1 Admin Users Get

patch.description: Update a user's tier, is_admin, or member limit. Requires admin:write scope or is_admin.

post.description: Manually trigger front history retention pruning. Admin only.
Clean up orphaned files for all users. Admin only.
Audit and correct storage usage counters for all users. Admin only.

put.description: Set or reset a user's member limit override. Admin only.
Update delete confirmation level. Requires password (+ TOTP if enabled).

get.description:
Export all user data as JSON. Critical for data portability and
pre-pruning exports in aaS free tier.

Return the user's current storage usage and quota.

Audits actual disk/S3 usage and corrects the tracked counter if drifted.
Cached per-user for 60s to avoid hammering storage on repeated loads.

post.description: Delete orphaned files and reclaim storage quota.
Preview what would be cleaned up without deleting anything.
Parse an SP export file and return a summary of importable data.

Import data from a SimplyPlural export file.

Upload the JSON export file with query parameters controlling what to import.
Use the preview endpoint first to see what's in the file and get member IDs
for selective import.

get.description:
Serve a file.

Signed mode (default): requires a valid HMAC token + expiry query params.
  S3: redirects to a short-lived presigned URL (cached in Redis).
  Filesystem: serves bytes directly after token validation.

Unsigned mode: no token required.
  S3: redirects to the direct public S3 URL (bucket must be public).
  Filesystem: serves bytes directly.

CDN mode (S3 + s3_public_url): URLs bypass this endpoint entirely —
  resolve_avatar_url returns a CDN URL directly. This endpoint is not
  reached in normal operation for that case.
